applicability_notes: Tensor-creation op executed directly on device; no host data transfer. Observed in MoE dispatch/combine paths to preallocate a zeroed combine output buffer before the cross-device dispatch barrier (one allocation per layer, per device). Acts as torch.zeros replacement when fill_value=0.; torch_pattern_source: semantic-equivalent (golden_src=null; moreh_full fills a new tensor of `shape` with `fill_value`, matching torch.full). Call sites use fill_value=0, i.e. torch.zeros(shape, dtype=torch.bfloat16).; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.moreh_full(shape={SHAPE}, fill_value={FILL_VALUE}, device={DEVICE}, layout={LAYOUT}, dtype={DTYPE}, memory_config={MEMORY_CONFIG})

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [effective_experts_k, tokens_per_device, hidden_size] per device (large 3D activation-sized buffer)
placement_observations.source: call_site: MoE combine preallocation — ttnn.moreh_full(shape=[effective_experts_k, tokens_per_device, hidden_size], fill_value=0, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) on mesh_device

placement_observations.tensor_role: output (zeroed combine output buffer allocated pre-dispatch)
placement_observations.source: call_site: fused MoE path — ttnn.moreh_full(shape=fused_config.combine_preallocated.shape, fill_value=0, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) on mesh_device, allocated before dispatch (dispatch is the cross-device barrier)
